---
title: "CV"
pagetitle: "CV — Bingjin Xue"
---

Full CV: [**PDF**](assets/Bingjin Xue CV.pdf) *(updated April 2026)*

## Positions

- **Assistant Professor of Economics**, University of New Hampshire, 2023–present

## Education

- **Ph.D. in Economics**, Lehigh University, 2023
- **M.S. in Analytical Finance**, Lehigh University, 2018
- **B.A. in Finance**, Nankai University, 2016

## Fields

Health economics · Applied microeconometrics · Development Economics

## Contact

[bingjin.xue@unh.edu](mailto:bingjin.xue@unh.edu)
